claim_under_attack: The three-tier classification system enforces the human-in-the-loop constraint by design because a rules-based classifier defaults upward on ambiguity instead of using an LLM for classification.
evidence_or_reason: This overstates enforcement. A default-upward rule only helps when the rule set detects ambiguity, but the artifact provides no evidence that keyword/regex rules can reliably recognize the full range of pricing or commitment language in real event conversations. Novel phrasings, implied discounts, package tradeoffs, or informal WhatsApp shorthand can be missed without being marked ambiguous at all, so the system can still misclassify T3 content downward. The PRD itself lists classifier accuracy as an unknown, which undercuts the stronger claim that the boundary is enforced 'by design.'
